name: accordion
title: Accordion
description: Animated disclosure panels for compact FAQ and settings layouts.
docs:
# Accordion
Animated disclosure panels for compact FAQ and settings layouts.
## Import
```tsx
import { Accordion } from "@/components/ui/accordion";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Accordion
  items={[
    { id: "1", title: "Question?", content: "Answer here." },
    { id: "2", title: "Another?", content: "More details." },
  ]}
/>
```
## Props
- **allowMultiple** (boolean) — default: `false`: Allow multiple
- **defaultTab** (string): Default tab
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add accordion
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/accordion
```
